maapToken.title: MAAP PGT:
maapToken.description: Token used to make authenticated requests to the MAAP API. e.g. PGT-XXXXXXX

defaultAppImage.title: Default Application Package Docker Image:
defaultAppImage.description:
Default docker image to use when building an OGC application package.
e.g. mas.maap-project.org/root/maap-workspaces/custom_images/maap_base:v5.0.0
